resource_key.description: The key under which the DynamoDB resource is registered.

aws_access_key_id_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the AWS access key ID.

aws_secret_access_key_env_var.description: Name of the environment variable holding the AWS secret access key.

endpoint_url.description: Custom endpoint URL (e.g. http://localhost:8000 for DynamoDB Local).

description: Register an AWS DynamoDB resource for serverless key-value and document storage
name: DynamoDB Resource
